name: Curried Egg and Artichoke Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 (10 oz) can unmarinated plain artichoke hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the eggs and artichoke hearts into chunks that are large enough to eat but small enough to scoop up on a cracker.
2. Mix equal parts sour cream and mayonnaise until all ingredients are moist and tasty. Add spices according to taste, using 2 parts curry to one part cumin. Adjust the amount of curry for a spicier flavor without overpowering the delicate artichoke taste.
3. Serve at parties; it is popular and goes quickly. Make ahead, refrigerate, and enjoy throughout the day.
